title: Move plan-domain governance and standards into plan/docs
summary: Move plan-domain governance and plan-runtime standards under plan/docs and remove the root docs authority.
scope_items: Move plan-domain governance standards into plan/docs/standards.
Retire root docs README and AGENTS guidance.
Update plan and root navigation to the new documentation boundary.
done_when_items: Root docs is no longer an active documentation root and plan-domain durable guidance resolves under plan/docs.
